evals.name: Extract analysis workflow from literature
evals.prompt: Analyze the analysis workflow of this paper in the working directory and summarize its technical roadmap.
evals.expected_output: Output analysis_workflow_summary.md file containing a structured summary of the literature analysis workflow, including analysis stages, methods/tools, key parameters, validation strategies, and reusable analysis patterns.
expectations: Produced analysis_workflow_summary.md file
File contains at least 3 major analysis stages
Each stage is annotated with its purpose and methods/tools used
Includes description of key validation strategies
Includes summary of reusable analysis patterns
Content is in structured Markdown format and written in Chinese
Output file
If the Read tool cannot fully read the PDF, used scripts/extract_pdf.py to extract text

evals.name: Extract workflow then adapt to new disease
evals.prompt: There is a paper in my working directory. Please analyze its analysis workflow, then generate a customized gastric cancer bioinformatics analysis plan based on the extracted workflow.
evals.expected_output: First output analysis_workflow_summary.md extracting the original workflow, then output custom_analysis_plan_gastric_cancer.md with a customized gastric cancer plan.
expectations: Produced analysis_workflow_summary.md file
Output file
Customized plan retains the original paper's analysis logic framework
Customized plan adapts data sources and recommendations for gastric cancer
Customized plan includes adaptation notes for each stage
Both files are in structured Chinese Markdown

evals.name: Pure protocol design (no literature, user directly provides disease)
evals.prompt: I don't really know how to read papers. Can you just tell me how I could design a bioinformatics analysis plan for diabetes-related research?
evals.expected_output: This is a test that should NOT trigger the skill - the user did not ask to extract a literature workflow. The skill should not be triggered, and the AI should answer the bioinformatics analysis protocol design question in a general manner without generating analysis_workflow_summary.md.
expectations: Did not generate analysis_workflow_summary.md file
Did not mention needing the user to provide a paper file (unless the user brought it up)
Provided diabetes bioinformatics analysis suggestions based on general knowledge
No workflow extraction process occurred

evals.name: PDF extraction + multi-method cross-validation
evals.prompt: There is a literature PDF in the working directory. Please analyze its analysis workflow.
evals.expected_output: Output analysis_workflow_summary.md with content based on complete PDF text extraction. If the Read tool cannot fully read it, should use scripts/extract_pdf.py to assist with extraction.
expectations: Produced analysis_workflow_summary.md file
Extracted analysis workflow covers all major analysis stages in the paper
Identified methodological details (e.g., statistical test methods, threshold settings, software versions)
Reusable analysis patterns reflect the paper's core methodological innovations
If the Read tool had limited reading capability, used scripts/extract_pdf.py script
